facts.text: Cavalli can accommodate up to 150 guests on Level 2 of the barn for reception. The external balcony holds approximately 50 guests.
Pricing starts at $15,000-$18,000 all-inclusive with tables, chairs, dinnerware, dance floor, and WiFi included.

Outside caterers are welcome — no requirement to use preferred vendors. Back-of-house includes two refrigerators, two freezers, industrial sink, dishwasher, three induction burners, and 220V outlets. No commercial range or oven.
All alcohol must be served by a licensed caterer or bar service. BYOB is not permitted. Cavalli's custom bar includes a kegerator, refrigerator, and bar stools.
All events end at 10:00 pm. DJ or band will be given a heads-up at 9:45 pm. After-party options available at Ravish and Cask & Rasher in Coxsackie.
Fireworks are not permitted. Alternatives include LED displays and sparklers.
Indoor ceremony backup is available. Level 2 is preferred for indoor ceremonies. Rain contingency plan is confirmed at the 60-day call.
Cancellation policy includes a 20% fee on total event cost.
Venue opens at 8:00 am on wedding day for vendor load-in. Day-before setup available 1:00 pm to 6:00 pm. Deliveries can be scheduled up to two days before.
Pickup window is 8:00 am to 12:00 pm the morning after the event. All decor, rentals, and personal items must be removed by noon.
Dedicated parking lot holds 50 vehicles. Staff coordinates overflow for larger events. Vendor vehicles park separately.

Rehearsal on the Great Lawn is self-managed for farmhouse guests. Barn access rehearsal window is 5:00 pm to 7:00 pm the evening before, included at no charge. Rehearsal dinner is a 3-hour add-on at $2,500.
A day-of coordinator and sound engineer are not included in the base package. They are available as Enhanced Onsite Support, an add-on package. Cavalli staff manage the space throughout the event.
Indoor and outdoor audio systems, two wireless microphones, and two portable speakers are included. Sound engineering requires either Enhanced Onsite Support or a separately hired engineer.

All wedding packages include a 2-night farmhouse stay for up to 10 guests. Four bedrooms, full kitchen, WiFi, EV charging, outdoor grill, and firepit. Check-in 2:00 pm, check-out 11:00 am day after event. Additional nights at $750/night.
Level 1 has bar, three bathrooms, and catering back-of-house for cocktail hour and dancing. Level 2 seats up to 150 for reception. Great Lawn is primary outdoor ceremony area.
Available tables include ten 72-inch rounds, ten 60-inch rounds, eight 8x3.5 foot rectangulars, and 15 pub tables for cocktail hour.
The barn is not climate controlled. For April and July-August events, timing and airflow are factored into planning at the 60-day call.
Outside vendors are welcome. Caterers, rental companies, and bar service providers must provide a certificate of insurance. All vendors receive a Cavalli Vendor Brief two weeks before the event.
60-day call covers full layout, vendor list, and rain plan. 30-day call confirms runsheet and vendor load-in times. Vendor briefs sent 2 weeks out.
Cavalli is set on 90 acres between the Hudson River and the Catskill Mountains in Coxsackie, NY. Phone: (518) 212-7758. Email: info@cavallihudsonvalley.com.
If both ceremony and reception are on Level 2, Cavalli handles the room flip. Plan 30 minutes of cocktail hour to cover the transition.
Contact Cavalli at info@cavallihudsonvalley.com or (518) 212-7758. Website: cavallihudsonvalley.com.
